name: whatsapp-bot-platform
description: Production-grade, event-driven WhatsApp bot microservices platform

scripts.dev: concurrently -k -p "[{name}]" -n "gateway,journey,game,segment,notif,analytics,config" -c "cyan,magenta,yellow,blue,green,red,white" "npm run start:gateway" "npm run start:journey" "npm run start:game" "npm run start:segmentation" "npm run start:notification" "npm run start:analytics" "npm run start:config"
